title: ixigo Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)

jsonLd.title: ixigo Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at ixigo Consulting Pvt Ltd. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Thane-based team.

About ixigo Consulting Pvt Ltd:
ixigo Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ixigo Consulting Pvt Ltd!
